description_long: This is a pair of low-top, urban-style sneakers predominantly black with gray accents and laces. The shoes feature mesh side panels for breathability and a thick, textured gray sole that appears durable and suitable for street use. The outer heel area displays bold white text reading 'FALLEN HOPE', while the back heel has the word 'Arnt' and additional branding. The tongue and toe box are adorned with a stylized logo, and the overall design is modern and sporty. The shoes have a standard criss-cross lacing system and reinforced toe and heel areas for added protection. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather, mesh fabric, and rubber, making them both comfortable and robust for urban environments.
description: A pair of black and gray low-top sneakers with mesh panels, bold white branding, and a thick, textured sole. The design is modern, sporty, and suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, gray laces, and the logo on the tongue and toe area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mesh panel, 'FALLEN HOPE' branding, and the full profile of the thick sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'Arnt' branding and additional text on the heel tab.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with mesh panel and 'FALLEN HOPE' branding visible, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_logo: White stylized 'F' logo on the tongue and toe box, white 'FALLEN HOPE' text on the outer heel, 'Arnt' on the back heel.
